name: half
description: Project scaffolder and atomic task manager for AI-assisted development

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/core/args.test.js dist/scaffold/token-replacer.test.js dist/task/task-id.test.js dist/task/task-store.test.js dist/e2e/cli.test.js
scripts.test:unit: npm run build && node --test dist/core/args.test.js dist/scaffold/token-replacer.test.js dist/task/task-id.test.js dist/task/task-store.test.js
scripts.test:watch: node --import tsx/esm --test --watch src/core/args.test.ts src/scaffold/token-replacer.test.ts src/task/task-id.test.ts src/task/task-store.test.ts
